news.paragraph: Traders should weigh recent downward pressure on exchange-traded funds caused by rising Treasury yields and geopolitical uncertainty against long-term bullish drivers like industrial demand and record-breaking commodity trends. While macro headwinds have recently pushed equities and ETFs lower, high-profile investor optimism regarding precious metals remains a factor. Although no direct catalyst for SLV is imminent, recent earnings from silver-related company Metalla provide additional sector context.

headlines.title: Treasury Yields Jump Amid Fed Shift. Blame These Culprits As S&P 500 Falls.
